profiles.control: Newest published upstream cu130 vLLM wheel commit with matched FlashInfer packaging and no performance source carries.
profiles.deepgemm: control plus external DeepGEMM PR #380 at 0a482adcca52f5f4d83855e3ab926b53da0975b1.
profiles.deepgemm-stack: deepgemm plus SM12x FlashInfer all-reduce, the exact CUDA resolver, and vLLM #48317; excludes vLLM #48303/#48304 and FlashInfer #3817/#3834.
profiles.mtp: #48303 + SM12x FlashInfer all-reduce selector + #48317 + FlashInfer #3903 + final #3930 resolver.
